title: Twenty-Fourth Judicial District
doc_html:
§621.24.  Twenty-Fourth Judicial District

The Twenty-Fourth Judicial District shall have sixteen judges.  Four judges, Divisions E, J, M, and O, shall be elected from election section one; nine judges, Divisions A, B, D, F, H, I, K, L, and N, shall be elected from election section two; and three judges, Divisions C, G, and P, shall be elected from election section three.

Acts 1956, Ex.Sess., No. 7, §1; Acts 1960, No. 10, §1; Acts 1964, No. 2, §1; Acts 1965, No. 3, §1; Acts 1968, No. 78, §1; Acts 1972, No. 5, §1, emerg. eff. June 9, 1972, at 4 P.M.; Acts 1974, No. 503, §2, emerg. eff. July 12, 1974; Acts 1977, No. 620, §8, eff. June 1, 1978; Acts 1978, No. 39, §17, eff. June 1, 1978; Acts 1981, No. 568, §3(a), eff. July 20, 1981; Acts 1990, No. 8, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1991; Acts 2012, No. 457, §1, eff. June 1, 2012.
